channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: At least 12 people shot at an Ohio festival and a search for suspects is still ongoing, police say
item.description: Authorities say a shooting near a busy street festival in Ohio has wounded at least 12 people. Toledo police say the shooting happened Saturday near the Old West End Festival, an annual gathering of live music and home tours in a historic district.

item.title: Rob Sand to rally in Iowa governor bid with Kentucky Gov. Andy Beshear as Democrats eye a flip
What to know about new trials ordered for two paramedics in the death of Elijah McClain
